layout.title: Settings
layout.description: Manage your profile and account settings

profile.title: Profile settings
profile.heading: Profile
profile.description: Update your name and email address
profile.name: Name
profile.resendLink: Click here to re-send the verification email.
profile.sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

security.title: Security settings
security.heading: Update password
security.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure

appearance.title: Appearance settings
appearance.heading: Appearance settings
appearance.description: Update the appearance settings for your account

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
deleteAccount.caution: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.dialogTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.dialogDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.enabledDesc: You will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.
twoFactor.disabledDesc: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
twoFactor.setupDesc: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app
twoFactor.verifyDesc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.enabledSetupDesc: Two-factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.

recoveryCodes.title: 2FA recovery codes
recoveryCodes.description: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
recoveryCodes.warning: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click <bold>Regenerate codes</bold> above.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Manage your passkeys for passwordless sign-in
passkeys.emptyDesc: Add a passkey to sign in without a password
passkeys.unsupported: Passkeys are not supported in this browser.
passkeys.name: Passkey name
passkeys.nameHint: A name helps you identify this passkey later.
passkeys.removeDesc: Are you sure you want to remove the "{{name}}" passkey? You will no longer be able to use it to sign in.
